patterns_recognized: Carry-thesis OVERRIDE suppression gate confirmed active: full_prob >= 0.62 for the model-pick side blocks override regardless of f5_full_delta magnitude (SEA@BAL 6/10: BAL full_prob=0.638 → BAL won 7-2 after SEA override; same pattern appears today in LAD@PIT and SEA@BAL).

HARD CAP 10 CONFIRM rescue requires Stage 1/2 directional alignment + strong F3 + pen advantage; Stage-disagreement picks (MIN@DET f5_full_delta=0.133, MIN wins F5 but DET wins full) with near-zero pen gap disqualify the rescue per 6/7 SF@CHC validated criteria.

Coors altitude over-weighting continues: model assigns COL home-pick at 51% despite CHC SP xERA advantage +1.05 and PQI -19.8 against COL; market correctly prices CHC at 53.96% implied — the gap is park-factor inflation not genuine value.

D-grade + SP xERA AGAINST pick is a reliable directional loss signal (5/5 on 6/5, multiple confirmations 6/6-6/10); treat opposing-SP team as preferred direction on D-grade games — the SP quality gap outweighs marginal model probability in this grade band.

STL @ NYM.reasoning: HARD CAP 10 correctly blocked this bottom-bucket marginal pick (pick_prob=0.5193, score=1→0). No F-signal fired, no SP edge (Hunter Dobbins vs Christian Scott, neither flagged), f5_full_delta=0.0024 (stages essentially flat). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0141 mildly adverse for STL. No market odds. CONFIRM rescue of CAP 10 requires at minimum Stage alignment and F-signal fire — absent here. 6/10 STL won 9-2 but that was classified as C-grade variance with identical signal quality; SKIP was correct process then and now.

MIN @ DET.reasoning: Pre-cap F3_swing_take_gap=2832.6 is strong, but Stage 1/2 disagree directionally: MIN wins F5 at 58.12%, DET wins full at 55.2% (f5_full_delta=0.133, just below 0.15 threshold). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=0.0029 (near-zero) means DET cannot bridge the F5 deficit through late-inning bullpen leverage. PQI slightly against DET (Δ=-3.4). No market odds. Per 6/7 SF@CHC lesson, CAP 10 CONFIRM rescue requires Stage alignment — Stage disagreement here disqualifies it. Downgrade to SKIP.

ARI @ MIA.reasoning: Pre-cap score=-3: Tyler Phillips (MIA home) carries a 3.77 xERA advantage over Merrill Kelly (ARI away), and PQI heavily against ARI (+34.1). Both SP and PQI consistently oppose the model's ARI pick. No market odds available. 6/10 ARI@MIA was NO_PICK (PENDING_SP_DATA) with MIA winning 8-0. All signal layers reliably identify ARI as structurally weaker. D-grade SKIP is the correct and well-supported conclusion.

TEX @ KC.reasoning: Carry-thesis conditions fully met: f5_full_delta=0.1511 (≥0.15 threshold), hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0034 (<0.020). KC dominates F5 at 60.18%; TEX full-game flip unsupported by bullpen depth. Suppression gate does not apply (TEX full_prob=0.5493 <0.62). Market aligns: KC implied 51.77% vs TEX model 54.93% (edge_pp=6.7pp may be inflated by confidence_downgrade=True). SP also slightly favors KC (Rocker +0.39 xERA over Wacha). acute_roster stress further weakens TEX claim. OVERRIDE to KC; SKIP tier maintained per D-grade.

CHC @ COL.reasoning: D-grade (-2): Cabrera (CHC away) carries 1.05 xERA advantage over Feltner (COL home); PQI against COL (Δ=-19.8). Market correctly prices CHC at 53.96% implied; edge_pp=4.97pp reflects Coors altitude inflation, not genuine COL value. f5_full_delta=0.0486 (<0.15, no carry-thesis). 6/10 COL won 3-2 over CHC was classified as 1-run Coors variance, not a signal change. Coors park-factor over-weighting is a known model deficiency; CHC is the structurally superior side. CONFIRM the SKIP.

LAD @ PIT.reasoning: Strong signal stack: F2_xwoba_gap=0.026, Wrobleski SP edge +0.66 xERA over Keller, PQI confirms (−14.2). BvP OWNERs Ohtani (shrunk 0.971, 12 PA) and Freeman (shrunk 0.941, 20 PA) vs Keller top the lineup. pen_strain_pick_side=0.1147 (HIGH: LAD's dangerous top-of-order will punish PIT bullpen). Carry-thesis suppressed by gate (LAD full_prob=0.6828 ≥0.62). Edge in-band at +4.27pp. 6/10 LAD@PIT loss (9-8) was 1-run variance with negative edge that day; today edge is positive and BvP constellation is strong.

SEA @ BAL.reasoning: Pre-cap D (−4): Bryan Woo (SEA) carries 1.16 xERA edge over Bradish (BAL), PQI against BAL (Δ=−17.6), SEA wins F5 at 68.82%, bullpen_fatigue and confidence_downgrade=True flagged. Carry-thesis conditions met (f5_full_delta=0.3515, gap=0.0033) but suppression gate blocks override (BAL full_prob=0.6633 ≥0.62). 6/10 confirmed: carry-thesis override to SEA backfired when BAL full_prob=0.638 — BAL won 7-2. D-grade with four negative signals correctly assessed as SKIP. Suppression gate holds.

ATL @ CHW.reasoning: CHW home SP not yet announced; PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly blocks directional commitment. No SP Statcast data means no reliable xERA, no edge calculation, and no valid tier assignment. 6/10 ATL@CHW had the same status (CHW won 2-1, protocol validated). No directional read is appropriate here.
